results.query: What is the late payment penalty for a personal loan?
results.description: Policy question about late payment fees

top_result.title: Late Payment Penalty
top_result.content_preview: If an EMI is overdue, a late payment penalty of 2% per month is charged on the overdue amount. Additional fees may apply based on the loan agreement.

results.query: What payment methods are available for EMI payment?

top_result.title: EMI Payment Methods
top_result.content_preview: Customers can pay EMIs using online banking, bank transfer, UPI, debit card, auto-debit, NEFT, RTGS or by visiting the nearest branch.

results.query: I cannot afford to pay this month, what are my options?

top_result.title: Handling Financial Difficulty Objection
top_result.content_preview: When a borrower expresses financial difficulty, respond with empathy: 'I understand you're going through a challenging time. We have several options that may help.' Available options include: 1) EMI H

results.query: What happens if my loan becomes NPA?

top_result.title: Non-Performing Asset Policy
top_result.content_preview: A loan is classified as a Non-Performing Asset (NPA) if installments remain overdue for more than 90 days. An NPA classification may negatively affect the customer's credit score and future borrowing

results.query: How do I prepay my home loan?
results.description: Product question about home loan prepayment

top_result.title: Home Loan Prepayment
top_result.content_preview: Customers may prepay or foreclose their home loan before maturity. Foreclosure charges, if applicable, depend on the loan agreement and regulatory guidelines.

results.query: I want to file a complaint about the service

top_result.title: Complaint and Grievance Handling
top_result.content_preview: Customers may register a complaint through customer care, email, or the grievance portal. Unresolved complaints can be escalated to the grievance officer.

results.query: Is there a grace period for my payment?

top_result.title: Grace Period Policy
